title: For Loop with continue to skip a number

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we use a for loop with a continue statement to skip unavailable items on a shelf. Item number 4 is marked as unavailable, so the loop skips it and continues checking the rest.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Checking item 1
Checking item 2
Checking item 3
Checking item 5
Checking item 6
```
